zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Myles Sandys於1520年3月29日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾拉梅時，他的父親William Sandys27歲，母親Margaret Dixon23歲。他於大約1550年4月與Hester Clifton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1601年10月22日在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德享年81歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Myles Sandys于1520年3月29日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾拉梅时，他的父亲William Sandys27岁，母亲Margaret Dixon23岁。他于大约1550年4月与Hester Clifton在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1601年10月22日在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德享年81岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德。

nameMeanings.name: Sandys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sands
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name from Middle English sandes ‘sands’, for someone who lived at or near a sandy place, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Sands in Carlisle (Cumberland) or Sands Cottages in West Hoathly (Sussex). See Sand , of which Sands may sometimes be a plural form or a variant, with excrescent -s. Compare also Sandes and Sandys .

History: Comfort Sands, a revolutionary patriot born in 1748 at what is now Sands’ Point, Long Island, NY, was descended from James Sand(y)s (1622–95), who emigrated from Reading, Berkshire, England, to Plymouth, MA, and followed Anne Hutchinson to Westchester County, NY, and subsequently RI. In 1661 he settled on Block Island, RI.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Myles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Myles Sandys was born on 29 March 1520, in Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William Sandys, was 27 and his mother, Margaret Dixon, was 23. He married Hester Clifton about April 1550, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 22 October 1601, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Myles Sandys est né le 29 mars 1520, à Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Sandys, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Dixon, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Hester Clifton environ avril 1550, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1601, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Myles Sandys am 29. März 1520 in Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Sandys 27 und seine Mutter Margaret Dixon 23. Er hat um April 1550 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Hester Clifton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Oktober 1601 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England und wurde in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Myles Sandys è nato il il 29 marzo 1520 nel Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, William Sandys, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Dixon, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Hester Clifton circa aprile 1550, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1601, nel Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Hawkshead, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Myles Sandysが1520年3月29日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラティマーで生まれた時，父William Sandysは27歳，母Margaret Dixonは23歳であった。約1550年4月にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでHester Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1601年10月22日にイギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドで81歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England, U: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 메리 알더먼버이
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Myles Sandys(이)가 1520년 3월 29일 영국 벅잉함실르 레이팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Sandys(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Dixon(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1550년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Hester Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1601년 10월 22일 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에 묻혔다.

pt.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England, U: St Mary Aldermanbury, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Myles Sandys nasceu em 29 de março de 1520, em Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Sandys, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Dixon, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Hester Clifton aproximadamente abril de 1550, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1601, em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.St Mary Aldermanbury, London, England, U: ст мэри алдирманбури, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Myles Sandys родился 29 марта 1520 г. в местности латимир, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Sandys было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Dixon, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Hester Clifton около апрель 1550 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 22 октября 1601 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия.

Se casó con Hester Clifton aproximadamente abril de 1550, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1601, en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Hawkshead, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
